mapper.select: SELECT biz_id, login_id, password, company_name, manager_name, contact_emails, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM biz_users WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT biz_id, company_name, contact_emails, notion_email, notion_page_id FROM biz_users WHERE notion_page_id IS NOT NULL AND notion_page_id <> '' AND is_active = 'Y'
